framework.name: Five-Stage AI Transformation Framework
framework.description: Evidence-based framework for scaling AI beyond pilots: (1) Diagnose and Align - precise problem framing with cross-functional stakeholder alignment; (2) Governance and Accountability - data ownership, quality standards, and KPI-tied oversight; (3) Redesign for Scalability - workflow reconfiguration, incentive realignment, shared data platforms; (4) Data Literacy and Reuse - standardized approaches across functions; (5) Start Small, Iterate, Scale - pilots as 'minimum viable transformations' with explicit learning objectives.
framework.raw_quote: The five stages are not rigid steps to be checked off in sequence, but interconnected elements that reinforce one another. A strong diagnosis without governance results in stalled adoption; governance without redesign becomes bureaucracy; iteration without reuse wastes resources.
